metadata.title: CyberAware - Security Awareness Platform
metadata.description: Reduce human risk with phishing simulations, personalized training, and intelligent automation.

hero.title: Reduce human risk in your organization
hero.description: CyberAware combines phishing simulations, risk analysis, and personalized training to build a strong and measurable security culture.

features.title: Everything you need in one platform
features.description: Four integrated modules working together to continuously reduce human risk.

phishing.title: Phishing Simulations
phishing.description: Realistic campaigns to measure and improve your team's resilience against attacks.

risk.title: Human Risk Analysis
risk.description: Identify vulnerable users and prioritize data-driven interventions.

training.title: Personalized Training
training.description: Adaptive courses that adjust to each employee's risk level.

automation.title: Intelligent Automation
automation.description: Automatic rules that respond to security events in real-time.

cta.title: Ready to strengthen your security?
cta.description: Join organizations already reducing their human risk with CyberAware.

dashboard.welcomeText: Welcome to {tenant}. Here's a summary of recent activity.
